kaelthas.SCORECARD_FINDING: 49th percentile - the strongest relative performance in any of Vinnyvozz's three analyzed raid nights. Overheal (55.0%) actually landed 6.7 points BELOW the Top 100 sample's worst real parse (61.7%), the first kill across all of Vinnyvozz's analyzed data where overheal did not exceed the sample's worst - a real break from the pattern seen on every other kill. HPM (4.32) ran at 0.71x the sample average, also the closest to sample-normal outside of Void Reaver. Active time (95.9%) was in line, and this was a single-boss 'KT Cleanup' raid with no other kills to compare against.
kaelthas.SPELL_COMPOSITION_FINDING: Lifebloom (25.3%) undershot the sample's 39.3% share, the largest gap; Rejuvenation (22.0%) and Swiftmend (11.4%) both ran ahead of their sample shares (10.1% and 4.9%) to compensate. Regrowth (31.1%) landed close to the sample's own 33.8% share, the smallest gap of any spell tracked this kill.
kaelthas.COOLDOWN_FINDING: Rebirth went unused against a real 61% sample usage rate on this specific boss - the only cooldown that crossed this pipeline's deviation threshold. Innervate and Nature's Swiftness were each cast once (self), and Swiftmend was cast 9 times across 8 targets, close to the sample's own average. Of the 8 deaths, four (Blockarina, Ghostpepperx, Vinnyvozz herself, Quruella) cluster within about 5.5 seconds of each other roughly 45 seconds after the nearest Swiftmend cast - reading as a real, sudden damage spike rather than a single missed cooldown, and Vinnyvozz's own death was part of that same cluster. The remaining deaths (two Lasmur, Silkyrebel, Captinhelp) trail Swiftmend or Nature's Swiftness casts by 0.7-19.7 seconds; Captinhelp's is the closest at under a second, but Nature's Swiftness doesn't itself heal, so it isn't a real missed-save case.
kaelthas.TARGET_FINDING: Target coverage (55.0%) and top-target concentration (17.1%, Captinhelp) both landed in line with the sample (57.7% and 20.9%).

RaidOverview.GEAR_CONSISTENCY_FINDING: consistent - only a single kill this raid, so there's no cross-kill variation to check
RaidOverview.GEAR_FINDING_NOTE: Back (item 29989) carries no permanent enchant - the same real gap seen in both of Vinnyvozz's other analyzed raid nights. Consumables (battle and guardian elixir) were complete on the one kill this raid; flask was not active, consistent with every other kill analyzed across Vinnyvozz's raid nights.
RaidOverview.RAID_SUMMARY_FINDING: This was a single-boss 'KT Cleanup' raid - just one real kill, Kael'thas Sunstrider, at the 49th percentile. This is notably the strongest relative kill across all of Vinnyvozz's three analyzed raid nights: it's the only kill where overheal (55.0%) did not exceed the Top 100 sample's worst real parse, breaking a pattern that held on every other kill analyzed. Rebirth went unused against a real 61% sample usage rate on this boss, and 8 deaths occurred, including Vinnyvozz's own as part of a 4-person cluster roughly 45 seconds after the last Swiftmend cast. One real gear note: the Back slot carries no permanent enchant, the same recurring gap seen on Vinnyvozz's other two analyzed raid nights.
